options.name: --assembly-info
options.description: Keep Assembly Info in a file

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Will not update any files, just outputs all the messages

options.name: --force
options.description: Will force an upgrade even though certain preconditions might not have been met

options.name: --no-backup
options.description: Will not create a backup folder

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Will not create a subfolder with the target framework in the output path
